LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER MARK SWENDSEN'S MOTION FOR WRIT OF MANDAMUS IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 14, 2014 TO GIVE PETITIONER AND RESPONDENT THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1110(C), (E) AND (F), AND LOCAL RULE 2.6C. PLAINTIFF MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE UNREDACTED PETITION AND RESPONDENT MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE UNREDACTED ANSWER TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JANUARY 14, 2014 AT 4:00 PM. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). NO LATER THAN JANUARY 30, 2014 AT 4 PM, PLAINTIFF SHALL LODGE AN ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD THAT IS IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1110(C), (E) AND (F). "DOCUMENTS BOUND TOGETHER MUST BE CONSECUTIVELY PAGINATED." (CRC 3.1110(C).) "ALL PAGES OF EACH DOCUMENT AND EXHIBIT MUST BE ATTACHED TOGETHER AT THE TOP BY A METHOD THAT PERMITS PAGES TO BE EASILY TURNED AND THE ENTIRE CONTENT OF EACH PAGE TO BE READ." (CRC 3.1110(E).) "EACH EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY A HARD 8 1/2 X 11 SHEET WITH HARD PAPER OR PLASTIC TABS EXTENDING BELOW THE BOTTOM OF THE PAGE, BEARING THE EXHIBIT DESIGNATION." (CRC 3.1110(F).) PETITIONER MAY PICK UP FROM DEPARTMENT 302 THE ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD LODGED ON OCTOBER 21, 2013 AND RE-LODGE IT IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1110(C), (E) AND (F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING, OPPOSITION AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

Mtn For Writ Of Mandamus
Off Calendar Feb-14-2014 Continued To Feb-28-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court modified its tentative ruling and ruled as follows:
PETITIONER MARK SWENDSEN's Motion For Writ Of Mandamus is continued to February 28, 2014 per agreement of the parties. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/EHG)

Mtn For Writ Of Mandamus
Off Calendar Jan-14-2014 Continued To Feb-14-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER MARK SWENDSEN's motion For Writ Of Mandamus is Continued to February 14, 2014 to give Petitioner and Respondent the opportunity to comply with CRC 3.1110(c), (e) and (f), and Local Rule 2.6C. Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of the unredacted Petition and Respondent must deliver courtesy copies of the unredacted Answer to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than January 14, 2014 at 4:00 pm. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). No later than January 30, 2014 at 4 pm, Plaintiff shall lodge an administrative record that is in compliance with CRC 3.1110(c), (e) and (f). "Documents bound together must be consecutively paginated." (CRC 3.1110(c).) "All pages of each document and exhibit must be attached together at the top by a method that permits pages to be easily turned and the entire content of each page to be read." (CRC 3.1110(e).) "Each exhibit must be separated by a hard 8 1/2 x 11 sheet with hard paper or plastic tabs extending below the bottom of the page, bearing the exhibit designation." (CRC 3.1110(f).) Petitioner may pick up from Department 302 the administrative record lodged on October 21, 2013 and re-lodge it in compliance with CRC 3.1110(c), (e) and (f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving, opposition and reply papers. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Mtn For Writ Of Mandamus
Off Calendar Dec-12-2013 Continued To Jan-14-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER MARK SWENDSEN'S Motion For Writ Of Mandamus IS Continued on the Court's own motion to January 14, 2014. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Denise Doucette, CSR #5963.
